included.description: 24-hour QuikTrip travel center at I-40 Exit 14 (Whitten Rd) in Memphis, opened April 2025 with six truck diesel bays, bulk DEF, certified truck scales, and a full-service QT Kitchens. Built as a travel-center format store to serve commercial truck traffic on I-40.
Independent 24-hour travel center (formerly listed as Lakeland 66) about 0.1 mile from I-40 Exit 20 (Canada Rd) in Lakeland, with diesel, a convenience store, restrooms, ATM, and truck parking.
Budget motel directly off I-40 Exit 12 (Sycamore View Rd) in northeast Memphis that explicitly advertises on-site truck parking for guests with large vehicles. Rooms include free Wi-Fi.

included.business_name: Tennessee Welcome Center - Memphis (I-40 Riverside Dr)
included.description: Official TDOT state welcome center at I-40 mile marker 0.3, Exit 1 (Riverside Dr) in downtown Memphis, with dedicated car, RV, and truck parking spaces, restrooms, and vending. Parking is limited to two hours and overnight parking is not allowed.

held.hold_reason: Near I-40 Exit 12A but sources conflict: findfuelstops lists truck parking while allstays describes it as a no-parking small fuel stop. Truck relevance and amenities unverified.

Advertises 24-hour truck/trailer repair serving I-40 near Exit 25, but service appears primarily mobile-dispatch and the fixed shop is in Eads off Highway 385, not verified at an I-40 exit. Only one substantive source.

excluded.business_name: South Memphis truck stop cluster (TA, Flying J, Love's, Broadway Truck Stop area)
excluded.reason: Located at I-55 exit 9 / Brooks Rd-Lamar Ave corridor in south Memphis, not at an I-40 exit 1-25. Per segment rules the I-55 south Memphis cluster is excluded.

excluded.business_name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash Memphis South
excluded.reason: Located at 3435 US Hwy 78 at I-240 Exit 21 (Lamar Ave), not on I-40 exits 1-25; also listed as temporarily closed.
Located in West Memphis, Arkansas (I-40 exit 280 AR / I-55 exit 4), outside Tennessee segment.
1,600-space paid truck parking facility at 4867 Getwell Rd with I-240 access; not at an I-40 exit 1-25.
Paid truck parking at 5178 Citation Dr in southeast Memphis (Lamar/I-240 corridor), not at an I-40 exit 1-25.
Fixed heavy-duty repair shop at 4225 Getwell Rd (I-240/south Memphis), not at an I-40 exit 1-25.
Located at 1784 E Brooks Rd near I-55, not at an I-40 exit 1-25.
Mobile-dispatch truck/trailer repair service (7889 Hwy 70, Bartlett); roadside-service category requires fixed facilities only.

excluded.business_name: CAT Scale - I-40 Exit 35 (Longtown) and Pilot Travel Center #149 - I-40 Exit 42 (Stanton)
excluded.reason: On I-40 but at exits 35 and 42, outside this segment's exit 1-25 range.

excluded.business_name: THP District 4 Scale House - Haywood County (I-40 W, MM 50)
excluded.reason: Nearest official I-40 weigh station per TN Dept. of Safety is at mile marker 50 in Haywood County, outside exits 1-25. No weigh station exists within the segment.

excluded.business_name: Gateway Tire & Service / Firestone Complete Auto Care (Whitten Rd)
excluded.reason: Passenger car and light truck tire shops near Exit 14; no confirmed commercial semi-truck tire service.

excluded.business_name: Sparkle Wash Mid-South / Fleet Clean Memphis
excluded.reason: Mobile fleet-washing services without a fixed drive-in truck wash at an I-40 exit 1-25.
